recommendations.title: Immediate engineering inspection recommended
recommendations.detail: Health score is below 40. Restrict load and dispatch a structural engineer on-site.

recommendations.title: Inspect for crack formation in tension members
recommendations.detail: Strain is the dominant SHAP contributor. Increased strain readings can indicate micro-crack propagation or section loss.

recommendations.title: Schedule targeted inspection: vibration g
recommendations.detail: Vibration G is the second strongest contributor in the global SHAP analysis.
